label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17

extraction.one_line_summary: URAN Rigoberto won from the breakaway at Monasterio de Tentudía, attacking late on the final climb to drop PACHER and HERRADA.
tactical_patterns: CRADOCK Lawson's time-trialist early attack deep into climb gained 26 seconds but ultimately failed against pure climbers.
URAN preserved energy in 13-rider break while others burned matches, bridged late when HERRADA attacked near summit.
MADER Gino Portuguese GC rider attacked favorites group on final climb, testing for gaps despite GC likely settled.

rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: positive: veteran showed exceptional energy management in strong 13-rider break, still had legs to bridge and win after 45min 50kph opening
rider_signals.CRADOCK Lawson: negative: time-trialist attacking early on climbs doesn't work even with 26-second gap against proper climbers
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: negative: Stage 15 winner dropped badly by favorites on final climb, lost 5 minutes, suggesting deep fatigue
rider_signals.MADER Gino: positive: Portuguese rider willing to attack GC group despite being outside podium contention, hunting stage opportunities
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: crashed out before stage start while fighting Pedersen and trying to distance Evenepoel, eliminated from GC
